title: Steampunk Elytra
description: Retextures the elytra to steampunk wings
body:
![Steampunk Elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dfa64706ea35d4ae590a5c8417db4a2a8a3c80e.png)

### **ABOUT**

Retextures the **elytra** to a **steampunk elytra** model. I made this to match my old steampunk skin and my recently designed [steampunk hammer](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mace-to-steampunk-hammer).\
More steampunk models for different weapons and tools soon!


### **COMPATIBILITY**
Works in versions 1.15 to 1.21.10.

### **SUPPORT ME**
I have just started making textures and you can support me by downloading this and future uploads. Thank you and enjoy!
